summary: Verified all 5 requested bug fixes via code review and E2E testing: 1) Truck profile save bug fix for anonymous users - localStorage persistence working, 2) Truck profile E2E test passed - values persist after save/re-open, 3) User icon stationary spin fix - heading freeze logic verified in code, 4) CSS vehicle-pointer transition verified, 5) SettingsView onSave has no redundant localStorage write.

minor.issue: API key reported as leaked (403 error) - TTS falls back to native browser speech synthesis. Non-blocking.

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: FirebaseProvider.tsx lines 79-93 - Anonymous user profile loaded from localStorage key `trucker_profile_{uid}`
VERIFIED: FirebaseProvider.tsx lines 268-278 - updateProfileData for anonymous users persists to localStorage via localStorage.setItem(`trucker_profile_{uid}`, ...)
VERIFIED: FirebaseProvider.tsx lines 90-95 - Initial truck profile defaults use non-zero values (height: 13.5, weight: 78500, length: 53, width: 8.5, axleCount: 5, axleWeight: 12000, trailerCount: 1)

VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx lines 5114-5140 - Heading smoothing logic has THREE branches: (a) speed < 1 && !isDriving → FREEZE heading completely (line 5119-5121), (b) speed > 0.5 || isDriving → apply dynamic dead zone and smoothing (lines 5122-5138), (c) neither → no update
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 5128 - Dynamic dead zone: 10° when speed < 5, 5° when speed < 15, 2° otherwise
VERIFIED: index.css lines 39-43 - .vehicle-pointer has transition: transform 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1) and will-change: transform
VERIFIED: SettingsView.tsx line 725 - onSave for TruckProfileModal only calls setTruckProfile(p), no redundant localStorage.setItem call

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 5 bug fixes verified via code review and E2E testing

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 bug fixes verified: 1) Truck profile save for anonymous users now persists to localStorage via FirebaseProvider.tsx updateProfileData function, 2) E2E test confirmed values persist after save/re-open within same session, 3) User icon stationary spin fix implemented with 3-branch heading smoothing logic that freezes heading when speed < 1 mph and not driving, 4) CSS vehicle-pointer has smooth 0.8s transition, 5) SettingsView onSave is clean with no redundant localStorage write. Guest login works. Tutorial can be skipped with SKIP button.

truck_profile_save_bug_fix.details: FirebaseProvider.tsx lines 79-93 loads anonymous profile from localStorage, lines 268-278 persist to localStorage on updateProfileData. E2E test confirmed values (height=11.11, weight=55555, truck#=TEST-9999) persist after save and re-open.

truck_profile_e2e.details: Guest login -> Settings -> Truck Profile modal -> Fill custom values -> Save -> Re-open -> Values persisted correctly

user_icon_stationary_spin_fix.details: NavigationView.tsx lines 5114-5140 has 3-branch heading logic: (a) speed < 1 && !isDriving → FREEZE, (b) speed > 0.5 || isDriving → dynamic dead zone + smoothing, (c) neither → no update. Dynamic dead zone: 10° at speed < 5, 5° at speed < 15, 2° otherwise.

css_vehicle_pointer.details: index.css lines 39-43: .vehicle-pointer { transform: rotate(var(--vehicle-rotation, 0deg)); transition: transform 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); will-change: transform; }

settings_view_onsave.details: SettingsView.tsx line 725: onSave={(p: any) => { setTruckProfile(p); }} - only calls setTruckProfile, no redundant localStorage.setItem

known_issues.gemini_api_key: Gemini API key reported as leaked (403 error) - TTS falls back to native browser speech synthesis

mocked_apis.none: No mocked APIs - all integrations are live
